revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-6-165

A conductor, usually in the form of a solid metal bar, used in a cubicle or in a building to distribute heavy currents round a system, such that supplies and loads can be connected at convenient positions.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Busbar}}
